name: ASPro-PD phase 3 ambroxol trial
summary: A multicenter phase 3 randomized trial protocol testing whether high-dose ambroxol slows progression in genetically stratified Parkinson disease.
population: Parkinson disease patients with confirmed GBA1 status

trial_details.expected_results_window: The local record is a phase 3 protocol, not an outcome report; no result window is recorded here.
trial_details.horizon_note: This is an active trial to watch, but the reviewed source layer does not include outcome results.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Lysosomal Restoration because they can show whether the intervention changes function, biomarkers, and safety in Parkinson disease patients with confirmed GBA1 status. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
